era: Indie Rock. E=6 -- angular, restless, wide-dynamic. Lo-fi indie to mainstream. Issaquah origin. v1.49.340.

location.formative: Issaquah suburbs. Cascade foothills. The alienation of 'nowhere' as creative fuel.
location.career: Modest Mouse. 1992-present. Up Records to Epic Records. Issaquah to the world.

members.name: Isaac Brock
members.note: The constant. Angular voice. Restless lyrics. Unusual tunings. Nasal, searching vocal style.

members.name: Jeremiah Green
members.note: Distinctive, complex drumming. Essential to the sound. Deceased 2022.

members.name: Eric Judy
members.note: Melodic, driving bass. Harmonic anchor beneath angular guitar.

former_members.name: Johnny Marr
former_members.note: Former Smiths guitarist. Joined for We Were Dead Before the Ship Even Sank.

associated_musicians.name: 764-HERO
associated_musicians.note: Up Records labelmates. Shared scene. John Atkins.

associated_musicians.name: Built to Spill
associated_musicians.note: Up Records. Shared aesthetic territory. Touring partners.

associated_musicians.name: Death Cab for Cutie
associated_musicians.note: Same era. Parallel indie trajectories. Gibbard/Brock as parallel voices.

theory_nodes.concept: Issaquah enters -- first Eastside city. First entry outside Seattle proper. Suburban/exurban. Cascade foothills. The alienation of 'nowhere' as creative fuel.
examples: First non-Seattle entry in the engine.
Suburban alienation as Modest Mouse theme.
theory_nodes.description: Issaquah enters. Eastside. First city outside Seattle.

genealogy.relationship: Modest Mouse at 199. Issaquah opens the Eastside.

theory_nodes.concept: Lo-fi to mainstream arc -- Up Records (indie) to Epic Records (major). Long Drive to Lonesome Crowded West to Good News. One of the most dramatic indie-to-mainstream arcs in PNW history.
examples: Up Records: Long Drive (1996), Lonesome Crowded West (1997).
Epic Records: Moon & Antarctica (2000), Good News (2004).
theory_nodes.description: Lo-fi to mainstream. Up to Epic. Identity preserved.

genealogy.relationship: Modest Mouse at 199. The arc as career theory.

theory_nodes.concept: E=6 angular intensity -- the highest S36 energy in recent degrees. Angular, restless, dynamically extreme. Spiky guitar + driving rhythm. Not grunge but approaching punk intensity from a different angle.
examples: Angular intensity: not volume but restlessness.
theory_nodes.description: E=6 angular intensity. Highest in indie/emo sequence.

cross_references.relationship: UP RECORDS CONNECTION! Both core Up Records artists. E=4 vs. E=6. Same origin, different trajectories.
E=5 to E=6. Emo intensity to angular indie. Escalating energy. Capitol Hill to Issaquah.
E=4 to E=6. Whisper to shout. Widest energy gap in consecutive emo/indie degrees.
Same era. Gibbard and Brock as parallel indie voices. Melodic vs. angular.
